summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard conservatively from the hydrated preflight artifact. No security-sensitive refs were detected. No close, merge, fix, or PR-raise actions are allowed for this job, and all five open inventory PRs require maintainer or technical judgment before any mutating follow-up.
